title: 4 x 12 Litre Storage Boxes With Lids Set of 4, Clear Multipurpose Nestable Stackable Plastic Storage Box With Lid Clear Containers For Home, Kitchen, Garage, Office, Accessories

These clear storage boxes with lids & integrated handles provide ease of use, easier visibility & navigation

MULTI-PURPOSE STORAGE FOR HOME & OFFICE: These plastic boxes with lids storage provide all round multipurpose storage solution to declutter your life. These clear plastic storage boxes are suitable for multi-purporse plastic storage containers to declutter home, office or workplace.

MAXIMIZE YOUR SPACE: Our clear plastic storage box with lid (Clear) are perfect for decluttering your home, providing an efficient solution for organizing seasonal clothing, shoes, and more while keeping everything visible and accessible.

HIGH GRADE & DURABLE: Our premium quality under bed storage box with lid is manufactured in Britain with polypropylene material with no nasty smells. These multipurpose sleek plastic boxes with lids storage are perfect for under bed storage.

Dimensions Approx: Comes as a set of 4, Each plastic box measures L38 x 26W x H16 cm, 12 litre capacity and weighs just 1.0Kg
